meta.title: Scluba — Digital scorecard for golf clubs.
meta.description: A digital scorecard in your club's colors. QR frame at the counter, native mobile sharing, 7-day rollout. From $49/month.

hero.subtagline: A digital scorecard in your club's colors. Players share it at the end of every round. Your name shows up in every post.

lines: Today, your players photograph their paper scorecard.
They post it to their stories.
problem.punchline: Every round is a post for golf — without the golf course.

insight.title: What if your players brought in new players?
insight.sub: A branded scorecard shared online mentions your club in every post. Members become an acquisition channel. No ad budget.

pillars.title: Three pillars, one piece of equipment.
pillars.lead: A branded digital scorecard, a live leaderboard during the round, a QR frame at the counter. Zero install on the player side. Zero burden on your team.

founders_quote.text: We built Scluba because we were tired of seeing paper scorecards photographed without any mention of the club.

items.title: Branded digital scorecard
items.body: Colors, logo, typography, your club's actual course. A web app — no download, no account for the player.

items.title: Live leaderboard + share
items.body: Real-time leaderboard during the round. Final card shareable as image and link, with your logo as signature.

items.title: QR frame on the counter
items.body: A display delivered turnkey, placed at reception or the pro shop. The player scans, the round starts.

flow.phase1Lead: Each player enters their score at each hole. The leaderboard updates in real time — everyone sees who's ahead.
flow.phase2Title: A scorecard in your club's colors.
flow.phase2Lead: Photo, logo, course, weather, score, holes grid: everything is composed automatically at the end of the round. Ready to share.
flow.phase3Lead: Players recap the round, add a note, sign their card. The card is ready.
flow.phase4Lead: iMessage, WhatsApp, Instagram Stories, Snap: one gesture to share. Your club's name shows up on every send.
flow.joinHelper: Type this code or scan the desk QR

showcase.title: Your card, in your golf course's identity.
showcase.lead: Coastal, forest, Mediterranean, heritage: the card adopts the visual codes of your club. No generic templates.

benefits.title: Three concrete benefits.
benefits.lead: Beyond the scorecard: a visibility lever, a brand signal, a commercial edge against neighboring clubs.

items.title: Organic visibility
items.body: Every shared round mentions your club on social. No ad budget to unlock. Your players become your ambassadors.

items.title: Modern brand image
items.body: A strong signal for golfers under 45, in a sport whose average age keeps rising. Your club shows it has anticipated.

items.title: Differentiation
items.body: A concrete pitch against neighboring clubs. A topic for your prospects, your members, and your commercial campaigns.

how.title: See your card before you sign.
how.lead: Give us your golf course URL. We extract logo, colors and photos to build your mockup in 24h. No commitment, no credit card.

items.title: 5 min on the phone
items.body: You share your website URL. We briefly discuss your identity, your courses, your constraints.

items.title: Mockup in 24h
items.body: A card in your image, ready to validate. Unlimited tweaks until your green light.

items.title: QR frame delivered
items.body: A frame ready to place on the reception desk. No technical install on the club side.

items.title: Monthly reporting
items.body: An email recap every month: scans, rounds played, social shares. Scluba usage in 30 seconds.

pricing.title: One price, all-inclusive.
pricing.lead: Everything you need to equip your club. No commitment, cancel any month.

trust.setup_note: No install on the player side

plans.name: Scluba
plans.tagline: Your club's name, on every shared card.
features: Digital scorecard in your club's identity
Club name visible on every player share
QR frame delivered to the reception desk
Multi-player live score entry, no install
Round photo embedded in the scorecard
Monthly email reporting: scans, rounds, shares

faq.title: Frequently asked questions.
faq.lead: The questions we get most often. If yours isn't here, drop us a line.

items.q: Does the player need to install an app?
items.a: No. A QR to scan, accessible from any phone. No install, no account.

items.q: Do you need our logo and brand guidelines?
items.a: No. We extract logo, colors and photos from your website to build the mockup. You validate.

items.q: How do we track Scluba usage?
items.a: A monthly email: scans, rounds played, social shares. Readable in 30 seconds.
None. Cancel any month. The 3-year commitment gives 20% off ($39/month).
No. We deliver a QR frame for the counter. No technical install on the club side.

items.q: Is this an official handicap tracking tool?
items.a: No. Scluba is a complementary service for player experience and club visibility. Not a replacement for official handicap tools.

items.q: How many clubs are already onboard?
items.a: We're launching in summer 2026 with a pilot of founding club partners. The 1st-month-free offer is reserved for the first 10 clubs — direct support from the co-founders.

cta.title: See your card within 24h.
cta.lead: Give us your golf course URL. We send you a personalized mockup within 24h. No credit card required.

form.name: Your name
form.success: Thanks, we'll get back to you within 24h.
form.error: Oops, something went wrong. Try again or email us directly.
